name: Scene request
about: Propose a new animation scene
labels: enhancement, scene

**Scene name and concept**
<!-- what would it be called and what does it look like? -->

**Visual description**
<!-- describe the animation — what moves, how it behaves, what it feels like -->

**Why does it fit drift?**
<!-- drift is ambient and calm — how does this scene match that mood? -->

**Any reference or inspiration?**
<!-- links, screenshots, videos, or existing screensavers that inspired this -->

**Are you willing to implement it?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
